hypothesis: If a chemically grounded evaluation framework integrating DFT-based simulation metrics (RMSD and SUN) with property-based and latent-space metrics is applied to generative materials models, then the simulation-based metrics will reveal systematic discrepancies in structural stability and novelty that ML-only metrics fail to capture, because DFT relaxation and convex hull analysis directly assess the true physical validity of generated crystal structures in ways that surrogate statistical measures cannot.
